transcript.final_response:
Done — I transformed `/data/users_v1.json` to v2 format, saved it to `/data/users_v2.json`, and printed it:

```json
[
  {
    "id": 1,
    "fullName": "Alice Smith",
    "email": "alice@example.com",
    "location": "Seattle",
    "migrated": true
  },
  {
    "id": 2,
    "fullName": "Bob Jones",
    "email": "bob@example.com",
    "location": "Portland",
    "migrated": true
  },
  {
    "id": 3,
    "fullName": "Carol Davis",
    "email": "carol@example.com",
    "location": "Denver",
    "migrated": true
  }
]
```
tool_calls:
jq '[.[] | {id, fullName: (.firstName + " " + .lastName), email: .emailAddress, location: .address.city, migrated: true}]' /data/users_v1.json > /data/users_v2.json
cat /data/users_v2.json
